analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including OpenAI's identity crisis, the impact of a new tax on second homes in NYC, and the state of the market. Travis Kalanick joins the show as a guest. The hosts also talk about the datacenter wars, Allbirds' stock surge, and Eric Swalwell's resignation from Congress.

takeaways.text: New tax on second homes in NYC may lead to a decrease in demand and a crash in the market
Allowing people to build units to satisfy demand can lead to lower rents and housing prices
Imposing arbitrary taxes can lead to a decline in investment and development in a city
OpenAI is pivoting to focus on business customers and win the agent platform layer
Anthropic's $30 billion run rate is inflated due to revenue share and accounting with AI model providers
Real estate in blue states is becoming less attractive to wealthy investors due to high taxes and regulations
The introduction of new taxes and regulations can lead to a slow bleed and hollowing out of a city's economy
The high-end real estate market in London has collapsed due to the introduction of the stamp tax
